claim: The WHO global incidence of noma from 1998 was estimated at 140,000 cases per year.
Noma is commonly transmitted directly from person to person.
Nifurtimox is contraindicated for people with a background of neurological or psychiatric disorders when treating Chagas disease.
Chagas disease cannot be transmitted through the consumption of contaminated food or beverages.
The medical care cost of patients with chronic Chagas disease is roughly equal to the cost of spraying residual insecticide.
The average estimated cost of rabies post-exposure prophylaxis (PEP) was US$ 108 as of 2018.
Intramuscular (IM) administration of human rabies vaccines is recommended over intradermal (ID) administration by the WHO.
The global cost of rabies is estimated to be around US$ 8.6 billion per year.
The extrinsic incubation period (EIP) of the dengue virus in a mosquito takes about 8–12 days when the ambient temperature is 25–28°C.
Human-to-mosquito transmission of the dengue virus can occur up to 2 days before a person shows symptoms of the illness.
The Qdenga vaccine is universally recommended for all age groups in both high and low dengue transmission settings.
Discontinuing antiseizure medicine can be considered after 2 years without seizures.
The risk of premature death in people with epilepsy is up to three times higher than in the general population.
The average availability of generic antiseizure medicines in the public sector of low- and middle-income countries is greater than 80%.
Epilepsy is defined as having a single unprovoked seizure.
At least one third of people with schizophrenia experiences complete remission of symptoms.
Heavy use of cannabis is known to decrease the risk of developing schizophrenia.
MDR-TB is a form of tuberculosis caused by bacteria that do not respond to rifampicin and isoniazid.
The Bacille Calmette-Guérin (BCG) vaccine works to protect babies or small children from getting severe forms of TB.
Globally, all people treated for TB receive full financial coverage and never face catastrophic costs.
